name: Chocolate Zucchini Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together the butter, oil, brown sugar, and granulated sugar at medium speed for about 2 minutes, or until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the buttermilk, vanilla extract, and eggs until well blended.
4. Reduce the speed to low and gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Stir in the shredded zucchini and chocolate chips.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
